metadata.description: Search for tie-free LOO vs replace-one separation witnesses
metadata.source: TASK-007 samples with recomputed tie-free maxima

tie_free_definition.condition: for every prediction used in the accepted LOO and replace-one witness records, the query has a unique nearest sample occurrence

search_space.sample_constraint: each graph vertex appears exactly once (no duplicates)

separation_target.fixed_sample_loo_max: max over delete indices of |loss_original - loss_deleted|
separation_target.fixed_sample_replace_one_max: max over replace indices of |loss_original - loss_replaced|

constraints: tie-free condition is checked on the predictions that certify the accepted witness record
no mathematical impossibility is claimed outside the searched space
